Agents are live

Your AI team
that actually works.

Six autonomous agents that research, build, write, sell, and trade — using real tools, producing real output, generating real revenue.

Open Dashboard → Meet the Agents

Autonomous Agents

24/7

To Get Started

The Team

Six agents. One mission.

Each agent has a specialty, its own LLM, and access to real tools. They consult each other, chain tasks, and self-improve.

🔍
Scout
Researcher
Searches the web, finds opportunities, discovers skills. Feeds intelligence to the entire hive.
⚒️
Forge
Builder
Writes code, builds landing pages, creates tools. Deploys to Netlify with one command.
✍️
Quill
Writer
Publishes articles on Dev.to, writes blog posts, creates marketing copy that converts.
🤝
Dealer
Sales
Finds leads, crafts outreach emails, manages customer relationships. Sells your products.
📊
Oracle
Analyst
Analyzes stocks, executes paper trades on Alpaca, backtests strategies with multi-lens AI analysis.
🧠
Nexus
Orchestrator
Reviews work quality, generates follow-up tasks, coordinates the hive. The brain of the operation.

Observability

Watch them think.

Real-time SSE trace stream shows every thought, tool call, and decision as it happens.

Live Trace

Platform

Not another chatbot.

Hive agents use real APIs and tools — they don't just talk, they do.

01
Native Function Calling
Agents use real tool schemas via OpenRouter. No text parsing — structured tool calls that always work.
02
50+ Real Tools
Web search, file creation, email, Stripe payments, Dev.to publishing, Alpaca trading, Netlify deploys, and more.
03
Inter-Agent Consultation
Agents consult each other mid-task. Scout finds data, asks Oracle to analyze it, then Dealer acts on the results.
04
Spend Controls & Guardrails
Per-agent budgets, daily/monthly limits, approval gates, topic blocklists. Your agents stay on-mission and on-budget.
05
Skill Marketplace
Install SKILL.md instruction packages that teach agents new capabilities. Search GitHub for community skills.
06
Pipeline Orchestration
Chain agents into multi-step workflows. Scout researches → Quill writes → Dealer sells. Fully automated.

Stop prompting.
Start deploying.

Hive is open source, self-hosted, and ready to work. Deploy your autonomous agent team today.

View on GitHub Live Demo →
